notes: These evals are intentionally diverse — covering form fill, modify, add, batch,
merge+watermark, inspect, and overlay. They span Chinese / CJK, multiple field
types, and the major sub-commands of the skill. Some need a sample PDF that the
user has not provided in the eval set itself — the agent should construct or
use the templates the skill ships.
Real evaluation has to actually run the produced PDFs through pdftocairo to
verify visual correctness (NOT PyMuPDF, which has the AP-stream quirk).
